query.text:
&CheckRelativeProcess;
select top 0 @@fieldExternal into #temp from d91$000000 a left join m91$000000 b on b.stt_rec = a.stt_rec join dmgia3 c on c.ma_vt = a.ma_vt left join dmkh d on d.ma_kh = c.ma_kh left join dmvt e on e.ma_vt = a.ma_vt
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @p char(6) select @p = convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) from c91$000000 where stt_rec = @stt_rec set @q = 'insert into #temp select distinct @@fieldExternal from d91$' + @p + ' a left join m91$' + @p + ' b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec' set @q = @q + ' join dmgia3 c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt left join dmkh d on d.ma_kh = c.ma_kh left join dmvt e on e.ma_vt = a.ma_vt' set @q = @q + ' where a.stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + ''' and a.ma_vt = ''' + replace(@ma_vt, '''', '''''') + '''' set @q = @q + ' and a.sl_duyet > 0 and a.xstatus in (''2'', ''5'') and ''' + replace(@sa_date, '''', '') + ''' between c.ngay_ct1 and c.ngay_ct2' set @q = @q + ' order by ma_kh' exec sp_executesql @q
declare @n1 int, @n2 int select @n1 = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_sl' select @n2 = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_gia_nt' update #temp set so_luong1 = round(so_luong1*he_so1/he_so, @n1), so_luong2 = round(so_luong2*he_so1/he_so, @n1), sl_min = round(sl_min*he_so1/he_so, @n1), sl_max = round(sl_max*he_so1/he_so, @n1) where he_so <> 0
update #temp set gia_nt = round(gia_nt*he_so/he_so1, @n2) where he_so1 <> 0 update #temp set so_luong1 = 0, so_luong2 = 0, sl_min = 0, sl_max = 0 where he_so = 0 update #temp set gia_nt = 0 where he_so1 = 0
select * from #temp order by ma_kh drop table #temp
